# Crane Nest

> Crane Nest (クレインネスト) is a direct-booking accommodation platform for Kansai, Japan.
> Guests can book entire-house guesthouses and machiya townhouses near Kansai International
> Airport (KIX), Osaka Namba and Kyoto — with airport transfer arrangement, passport-based
> online pre-check-in, host chat, coupons, long-stay discounts and secure Stripe payment.

## Key facts
- Service: accommodation direct booking + airport transfer, Kansai (Osaka / Kyoto), Japan
- Lower service fees than major OTAs; weekly (7+ nights) and monthly (28+ nights) discounts
- Online pre-check-in by photographing your passport
- Cancellation policies: flexible (full refund until 1 day before), moderate, strict — refunds calculated automatically
- Payment: credit cards via Stripe (Visa, Mastercard, AMEX)
- Languages: Japanese, English, Chinese (multi-currency display: JPY/USD/EUR/KRW/CNY)

## Pages
- [Official site (Japanese)](/site)
- [Official site (English)](/site/en)
- [Official site (Chinese)](/site/zh)
- [Search & book stays](/stays)
- [Airport transfer booking](/)

## For hosts
- Free listing; low commission only on confirmed bookings
- Smart pricing suggestions, revenue analytics, coupons, add-on upsells, Airbnb iCal calendar sync
